chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق أيض ا - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق أيض ا - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
text: حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ سَلِيطٍ الزَّيْدِيِّ قَالَ أَبُو الْحَكَمِ وَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عُمَارَةَ الْجَرْمِيُّ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ سَلِيطٍ قَالَ لَقِيتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ نَحْنُ نُرِيدُ الْعُمْرَةَ فِي بَعْضِ الطَّرِيقِ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ هَلْ تُثْبِتُ هَذَا الْمَوْضِعَ الَّذِي نَحْنُ فِيهِ قَالَ نَعَمْ فَهَلْ تُثْبِتُهُ أَنْتَ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ إِنِّي أَنَا وَ أَبِي لَقِينَاكَ هَاهُنَا وَ أَنْتَ مَعَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ مَعَهُ إِخْوَتُكَ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبِي بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي أَنْتُمْ كُلُّكُمْ أَئِمَّةٌ مُطَهَّرُونَ وَ الْمَوْتُ لَا يَعْرَى مِنْهُ أَحَدٌ فَأَحْدِثْ إِلَيَّ شَيْئاً أُحَدِّثْ بِهِ مَنْ يَخْلُفُنِي مِنْ بَعْدِي فَلَا يَضِلَّ

قَالَ نَعَمْ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ هَؤُلَاءِ وُلْدِي وَ هَذَا سَيِّدُهُمْ وَ أَشَارَ إِلَيْكَ وَ قَدْ عُلِّمَ الْحُكْمَ وَ الْفَهْمَ وَ السَّخَاءَ وَ الْمَعْرِفَةَ بِمَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ النَّاسُ وَ مَا اخْتَلَفُوا فِيهِ مِنْ أَمْرِ دِينِهِمْ وَ دُنْيَاهُمْ وَ فِيهِ حُسْنُ الْخُلُقِ وَ حُسْنُ الْجَوَابِ وَ هُوَ بَابٌ مِنْ أَبْوَابِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ فِيهِ أُخْرَى خَيْرٌ مِنْ هَذَا كُلِّهِ

فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبِي وَ مَا هِيَ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي قَالَ ( عليه السلام ) يُخْرِجُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْهُ غَوْثَ هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ وَ غِيَاثَهَا وَ عَلَمَهَا وَ نُورَهَا وَ فَضْلَهَا وَ حِكْمَتَهَا خَيْرُ مَوْلُودٍ وَ خَيْرُ نَاشِئٍ يَحْقُنُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهِ الدِّمَاءَ وَ يُصْلِحُ بِهِ ذَاتَ الْبَيْنِ وَ يَلُمُّ بِهِ الشَّعْثَ وَ يَشْعَبُ بِهِ الصَّدْعَ وَ يَكْسُو بِهِ الْعَارِيَ وَ يُشْبِعُ بِهِ الْجَائِعَ وَ يُؤْمِنُ بِهِ الْخَائِفَ وَ يُنْزِلُ اللَّهُ بِهِ الْقَطْرَ وَ يَرْحَمُ بِهِ الْعِبَادَ
خَيْرُ كَهْلٍ وَ خَيْرُ نَاشِئٍ قَوْلُهُ حُكْمٌ وَ صَمْتُهُ عِلْمٌ يُبَيِّنُ لِلنَّاسِ مَا يَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ وَ يَسُودُ عَشِيرَتَهُ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَوَانِ حُلُمِهِ
فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبِي بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي وَ هَلْ وُلِدَ قَالَ نَعَمْ وَ مَرَّتْ بِهِ سِنُونَ

قَالَ يَزِيدُ فَجَاءَنَا مَنْ لَمْ نَسْتَطِعْ مَعَهُ كَلَاماً قَالَ يَزِيدُ فَقُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَخْبِرْنِي أَنْتَ بِمِثْلِ مَا أَخْبَرَنِي بِهِ أَبُوكَ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لِي نَعَمْ إِنَّ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ فِي زَمَانٍ لَيْسَ هَذَا زَمَانَهُ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ فَمَنْ يَرْضَى مِنْكَ بِهَذَا فَعَلَيْهِ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ قَالَ فَضَحِكَ أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ ضَحِكاً شَدِيداً ثُمَّ قَالَ أُخْبِرُكَ يَا أَبَا عُمَارَةَ

إِنِّي خَرَجْتُ مِنْ مَنْزِلِي فَأَوْصَيْتُ إِلَى ابْنِي فُلَانٍ وَ أَشْرَكْتُ مَعَهُ بَنِيَّ فِي الظَّاهِرِ وَ أَوْصَيْتُهُ فِي الْبَاطِنِ فَأَفْرَدْتُهُ وَحْدَهُ وَ لَوْ كَانَ الْأَمْرُ إِلَيَّ لَجَعَلْتُهُ فِي الْقَاسِمِ ابْنِي لِحُبِّي إِيَّاهُ وَ رَأْفَتِي عَلَيْهِ وَ لَكِنْ ذَلِكَ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَجْعَلُهُ حَيْثُ يَشَاءُ

وَ لَقَدْ جَاءَنِي بِخَبَرِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ثُمَّ أَرَانِيهِ وَ أَرَانِي مَنْ يَكُونُ مَعَهُ وَ كَذَلِكَ لَا يُوصَى إِلَى أَحَدٍ مِنَّا حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ بِخَبَرِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ جَدِّي عَلِيٌّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَ رَأَيْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَاتَماً وَ سَيْفاً وَ عَصًا وَ كِتَاباً وَ عِمَامَةً

فَقُلْتُ مَا هَذَا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ لِي أَمَّا الْعِمَامَةُ فَسُلْطَانُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ أَمَّا السَّيْفُ فَعِزُّ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ أَمَّا الْكِتَابُ فَنُورُ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ أَمَّا الْعَصَا فَقُوَّةُ اللَّهِ وَ أَمَّا الْخَاتَمُ فَجَامِعُ هَذِهِ الْأُمُورِ

ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي وَ الْأَمْرُ قَدْ خَرَجَ مِنْكَ إِلَى غَيْرِكَ فَقُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَرِنِيهِ أَيُّهُمْ هُوَ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا رَأَيْتُ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ أَحَداً أَجْزَعَ عَلَى فِرَاقِ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ مِنْكَ وَ لَوْ كَانَتِ الْإِمَامَةُ بِالْمَحَبَّةِ لَكَانَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ أَحَبَّ إِلَى أَبِيكَ مِنْكَ وَ لَكِنْ ذَلِكَ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ

ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ رَأَيْتُ وُلْدِي جَمِيعاً الْأَحْيَاءَ مِنْهُمْ وَ الْأَمْوَاتَ فَقَالَ لِي أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) هَذَا سَيِّدُهُمْ وَ أَشَارَ إِلَى ابْنِي عَلِيٍّ فَهُوَ مِنِّي وَ أَنَا مِنْهُ وَ اللَّهُ مَعَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ

قَالَ يَزِيدُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) يَا يَزِيدُ إِنَّهَا وَدِيعَةٌ عِنْدَكَ فَلَا تُخْبِرْ بِهَا إِلَّا عَاقِلًا أَوْ عَبْداً تَعْرِفُهُ صَادِقاً وَ إِنْ سُئِلْتَ عَنِ الشَّهَادَةِ فَاشْهَدْ بِهَا وَ هُوَ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَنْ تُؤَدُّوا الْأَماناتِ إِلى أَهْلِها وَ قَالَ لَنَا أَيْضاً وَ مَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنْ كَتَمَ شَهادَةً عِنْدَهُ مِنَ اللَّهِ

قَالَ فَقَالَ أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَقْبَلْتُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقُلْتُ قَدْ جَمَعْتَهُمْ لِي بِأَبِي وَ أُمِّي فَأَيُّهُمْ هُوَ فَقَالَ هُوَ الَّذِي يَنْظُرُ بِنُورِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ يَسْمَعُ بِفَهْمِهِ وَ يَنْطِقُ بِحِكْمَتِهِ يُصِيبُ فَلَا يُخْطِئُ وَ يَعْلَمُ فَلَا يَجْهَلُ مُعَلَّماً حُكْماً وَ عِلْماً هُوَ هَذَا وَ أَخَذَ بِيَدِ عَلِيٍّ ابْنِي

ثُمَّ قَالَ مَا أَقَلَّ مُقَامَكَ مَعَهُ فَإِذَا رَجَعْتَ مِنْ سَفَرِكَ فَأَوْصِ وَ أَصْلِحْ أَمْرَكَ وَ افْرُغْ مِمَّا أَرَدْتَ فَإِنَّكَ مُنْتَقِلٌ عَنْهُمْ وَ مُجَاوِرٌ غَيْرَهُمْ فَإِذَا أَرَدْتَ فَادْعُ عَلِيّاً فَلْيُغَسِّلْكَ وَ لْيُكَفِّنْكَ فَإِنَّهُ طُهْرٌ لَكَ وَ لَا يَسْتَقِيمُ إِلَّا ذَلِكَ وَ ذَلِكَ سُنَّةٌ قَدْ مَضَتْ فَاضْطَجِعْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَ صُفَّ إِخْوَتَهُ خَلْفَهُ وَ عُمُومَتَهُ وَ مُرْهُ فَلْيُكَبِّرْ عَلَيْكَ تِسْعاً فَإِنَّهُ قَدِ اسْتَقَامَتْ وَصِيَّتُهُ وَ وَلِيَكَ وَ أَنْتَ حَيٌّ ثُمَّ اجْمَعْ لَهُ وُلْدَكَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِمْ فَأَشْهِدْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ أَشْهِدِ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ كَفَى بِاللَّهِ شَهِيداً

قَالَ يَزِيدُ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أُؤْخَذُ فِي هَذِهِ السَّنَةِ وَ الْأَمْرُ هُوَ إِلَى ابْنِي عَلِيٍّ سَمِيِّ عَلِيٍّ وَ عَلِيٍّ فَأَمَّا عَلِيٌّ الْأَوَّلُ فَعَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَ أَمَّا الْآخِرُ فَعَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) أُعْطِيَ فَهْمَ الْأَوَّلِ وَ حِلْمَهُ وَ نَصْرَهُ وَ وُدَّهُ وَ دِينَهُ وَ مِحْنَتَهُ وَ مِحْنَةَ الْآخِرِ وَ صَبْرَهُ عَلَى مَا يَكْرَهُ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مَوْتِ هَارُونَ بِأَرْبَعِ سِنِينَ

ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي يَا يَزِيدُ وَ إِذَا مَرَرْتَ بِهَذَا الْمَوْضِعِ وَ لَقِيتَهُ وَ سَتَلْقَاهُ فَبَشِّرْهُ أَنَّهُ سَيُولَدُ لَهُ غُلَامٌ أَمِينٌ مَأْمُونٌ مُبَارَكٌ وَ سَيُعْلِمُكَ أَنَّكَ قَدْ لَقِيتَنِي فَأَخْبِرْهُ عِنْدَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّ الْجَارِيَةَ الَّتِي يَكُونُ مِنْهَا هَذَا الْغُلَامُ جَارِيَةٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مَارِيَةَ جَارِيَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أُمِّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ فَإِنْ قَدَرْتَ أَنْ تُبَلِّغَهَا مِنِّي السَّلَامَ فَافْعَلْ

قَالَ يَزِيدُ فَلَقِيتُ بَعْدَ مُضِيِّ أَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) فَبَدَأَنِي فَقَالَ لِي يَا يَزِيدُ مَا تَقُولُ فِي الْعُمْرَةِ فَقُلْتُ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي ذَلِكَ إِلَيْكَ وَ مَا عِنْدِي نَفَقَةٌ فَقَالَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ مَا كُنَّا نُكَلِّفُكَ وَ لَا نَكْفِيكَ فَخَرَجْنَا حَتَّى انْتَهَيْنَا إِلَى ذَلِكَ الْمَوْضِعِ فَابْتَدَأَنِي فَقَالَ يَا يَزِيدُ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَوْضِعَ كَثِيراً مَا لَقِيتَ فِيهِ جِيرَتَكَ وَ عُمُومَتَكَ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ

ثُمَّ قَصَصْتُ عَلَيْهِ الْخَبَرَ فَقَالَ لِي أَمَّا الْجَارِيَةُ فَلَمْ تَجِئْ بَعْدُ فَإِذَا جَاءَتْ بَلَّغْتُهَا مِنْهُ السَّلَامَ فَانْطَلَقْنَا إِلَى مَكَّةَ فَاشْتَرَاهَا فِي تِلْكَ السَّنَةِ فَلَمْ تَلْبَثْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا حَتَّى حَمَلَتْ فَوَلَدَتْ ذَلِكَ الْغُلَامَ

قَالَ يَزِيدُ وَ كَانَ إِخْوَةُ عَلِيٍّ يَرْجُونَ أَنْ يَرِثُوهُ فَعَادُونِي إِخْوَتُهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ ذَنْبٍ فَقَالَ لَهُمْ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ وَ اللَّهِ لَقَدْ رَأَيْتُهُ وَ إِنَّهُ لَيَقْعُدُ مِنْ أَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ بِالْمَجْلِسِ الَّذِي لَا أَجْلِسُ فِيهِ أَنَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abu Al Hakam Al Armany who said, ‘Abdullah Bin Ibrahim Bin Ali Bin Abdullah Bin Ja’far Bin Abu Talib, from Yazeed Bin Saley Al Zaydi who said, ‘Abu Al Hakam said and Abdullah Bin Muhammad Bin Umara Al Jarmy informed me, from Yazeed Bin Saleyt who said,

‘I met Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> in one of the roads and we intended (performance of) Umrah. So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Do you realise this place which we are in?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, so do you realise it (as well)?’ I said, ‘Yes, because I and my father, we met you<sup>asws</sup>, we met you<sup>asws</sup> over here and you<sup>asws</sup> were with Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and with him<sup>asws</sup> were your<sup>asws</sup> brothers. So my father said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May my father and my mother die for you! You<sup>asws</sup> are all Purified Imams<sup>asws</sup>, and the death, no one is immune from it. So if there occurs an occurrence (of death) to me, whom would my descendants refer to after me so that they do not stray?’

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, O Abdullah! These are my<sup>asws</sup> children and this one<sup>asws</sup> is their chief’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured towards you<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> is known for the judgements, and the understanding, and the generosity, and the recognition of what the people would be needy to him<sup>asws</sup> for, and what they are differing in from the matters of their Religion and their world, and in him<sup>asws</sup> are the good morals, and the good answers, and he<sup>asws</sup> is a door from the doors of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, and in him<sup>asws</sup> is other, better than all of this’.

So my father said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘And what is it? May my father and my mother be (sacrificed) for you<sup>asws</sup>!’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Bring about from him<sup>asws</sup>, the relief of this community, and its blossoms, and its banners, and its light, and its merits, and its wisdom. He<sup>azwj</sup> would have the best of ‘مَوْلُودٍ’ (coming to world) and the best of the growths. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Save the blood by him<sup>asws</sup> and Reconcile by him<sup>asws</sup> between two parties, and Gather by him<sup>asws</sup> the diversities, and Bridge by him<sup>asws</sup> the rifts, and Clothe by him<sup>asws</sup> the bare, and Feed by him<sup>asws</sup> the hungry, and Secure by him<sup>asws</sup> the fearful, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Send down the drops (rain) due to him<sup>asws</sup>, and have Mercy on the servants due to him<sup>asws</sup>.

He<sup>asws</sup> would be the best of the elderly and the best of the budding (youths). His<sup>asws</sup> words would be wisdom and his<sup>asws</sup> silence - the knowledge. He<sup>asws</sup> would clarify to the people whatever they would be differing in, and he<sup>asws</sup> would be assisting his<sup>asws</sup> claim from before his<sup>asws</sup> attainment of the adulthood’.

So my father said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May my father and my mother be (sacrificed) for you<sup>asws</sup>! And has he<sup>asws</sup> been born yet?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, and years have passed’.

Yazeed said, ‘So there came to us one who we did not have the leeway of speaking (in his presence)’. Yazeed said, ‘Then I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘So (now) you<sup>asws</sup> inform me with similar to what your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> informed me with’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Yes. My<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> was in an era, (but) this isn’t his<sup>asws</sup> era’. So I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘So whoever is pleased from you<sup>asws</sup> with this (much only), so upon him is the Curse of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’. So Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> laughed intensely, then said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> shall inform you, O Abu Umara!

I<sup>asws</sup> came out from my<sup>asws</sup> house, so I<sup>asws</sup> bequeathed to my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> so and so, and I<sup>asws</sup> participated with him<sup>asws</sup> my<sup>asws</sup> (other) sons regarding the apparent, and I<sup>asws</sup> bequeathed to him<sup>asws</sup> in the hidden, alone, and had the matter been to me<sup>asws</sup>, I<sup>asws</sup> would have made it to be in Al-Qasim, my<sup>asws</sup> son, due to my<sup>asws</sup> love for him and my<sup>asws</sup> kindness upon him. But, that is up to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic. He<sup>azwj</sup> Makes it to be wherever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to.

And Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> had come to me<sup>asws</sup> with his<sup>asws</sup> news, then he<sup>saww</sup> showed him<sup>asws</sup> to me<sup>asws</sup>, and I<sup>asws</sup> saw the ones who would be with him<sup>asws</sup>. And like that it is. Not one of us<sup>asws</sup> can be bequeath until Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> comes with his<sup>asws</sup> news, and my<sup>asws</sup> grandfather<sup>asws</sup> Ali<sup>asws</sup>. And I<sup>asws</sup> saw with Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, his<sup>saww</sup> ring, and his<sup>saww</sup> sword, and his<sup>saww</sup> staff, and his<sup>saww</sup> Book, and his<sup>saww</sup> turban.

So I<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What is this, O Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>?’ So he<sup>saww</sup> said to me: ‘As for the turban, so it is the Authority of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, and as for the sword, so it is the Might of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High, and as for the Book, so it is the Light of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High, and as for the Staff, so it is the Strength of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and as for the ring, so it is the entirety of these matters’.

Then he<sup>saww</sup> said to me: ‘And the command (Imamate) has come out from you<sup>asws</sup> to other than you<sup>asws</sup>’. So I<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘O Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>! Show me<sup>asws</sup>, which of them is he<sup>asws</sup>?’ So Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> have not seen anyone from the Imams<sup>asws</sup> anyone more apprehensive upon the separation of this command than you<sup>asws</sup>, and had the Imamate been with the love, it was so that Ismail was more beloved to your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> than you<sup>asws</sup> were, but that is from Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.

Then Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And I<sup>asws</sup> saw my<sup>asws</sup> children altogether, the living ones from them and the deceased. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘This one is their chief’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured towards my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Ali<sup>asws</sup>, ‘So he<sup>asws</sup> is from me<sup>asws</sup> and I<sup>asws</sup> am from him<sup>asws</sup>, and Allah<sup>asws</sup> is with the good doers’.

Yazeed said, ‘Then Abu Ibrahimasws said: ‘O Yazeed! It is a deposit with you, therefore do not inform with it to anyone except an intellectual, or a servants whose sincerity you recognise, and if you are asked about the witnessing, so testify with it, and these are the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [4:58] Surely Allah Commands you to make over trusts to their owners. And Heazwj Said to us as well [2:140] And who is more unjust than he who conceals a testimony that he has from Allah?’

He (the narrator) said, ‘So Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So I<sup>asws</sup> turned towards Rasool-Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You<sup>saww</sup> have gathered them for me<sup>asws</sup>. By my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> and my<sup>asws</sup> mother, so which of them is he<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> is the one who looks by the Light of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, and he<sup>asws</sup> hears by His<sup>azwj</sup> Understanding, and he<sup>asws</sup> speaks by His<sup>azwj</sup> Wisdom. He<sup>asws</sup> gets its right and he<sup>asws</sup> does not err, and he<sup>asws</sup> knows and he<sup>asws</sup> is not ignorant. He<sup>asws</sup> is Taught the Wisdom and the Knowledge. He<sup>asws</sup> is this one’, and he<sup>saww</sup> grabbed the hand of Ali<sup>asws</sup>, my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>’.

Then hesaww said: ‘How little is yourasws remaining with himasws. So when youasws return from yourasws journey, so bequeath, and correct yourasws affairs, and be free from whatever you want, so youasws would be transferring from them and be in the vicinity of other than them. So whenever youasws want, so call Aliasws, so let himasws wash youasws, and let himasws enshroud youasws, for it would be cleaner for youasws, and nothing is straight except for that, and that is a Sunnah of the past. Then recline in front of himasws, and form rows of hisasws brothers behind him, and hisasws being a prayer leader, and instruct himasws, so let him exclaim Takbeer upon youasws, nine (exclamations), so it would he established yourasws bequest and yourasws Guardian, while youasws are alive. Then gather yourasws sons for himasws, from after himasws, so get them to bear witness, and keep Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic as a Witness, and Allahazwj Suffices as a Witness’.

Yazeed said, ‘Then Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> would be Taken during this year and the command (Imamate), it would be with my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Ali<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> was named by Ali<sup>asws</sup> and Ali<sup>asws</sup>. So as for the first Ali<sup>asws</sup>, so it is Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Abu Talib<sup>asws</sup>, and as for the other Ali<sup>asws</sup>, so it is Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> has been Given the understanding of the first one, and his<sup>asws</sup> forbearance, and his<sup>asws</sup> victory, and his<sup>asws</sup> cordiality, and his<sup>asws</sup> Religion, and his<sup>asws</sup> loved, and his<sup>asws</sup> ordeals and the ordeals of the other, and his<sup>asws</sup> patience upon what he<sup>asws</sup> dislikes, and it isn’t for him<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> speaks except after the death of Haroun (Al-Rashid the Caliph) by four years’.

Then, he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘O Yazeed! And when you pass by this place and meet him<sup>asws</sup>, and you shall be meeting him<sup>asws</sup>, so give him<sup>asws</sup> the glad tidings that a boy would be born unto him<sup>asws</sup> trustworthy, secure, Blessed, and he<sup>asws</sup> would be letting you know that you had met me<sup>asws</sup>. So inform him<sup>asws</sup> during that, that the slave girl which this boy would happen to be from, is a slave girl from the Household of Maria (the Coptic), the slave girl of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, the mother of Ibrahim<sup>as</sup> (son<sup>as</sup> of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>). So if you are able to deliver the greetings from me<sup>asws</sup>, then do so’.

Yazeed said, ‘So I saw Ali<sup>asws</sup> after the passing away of Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> initiated me by saying to me: ‘O Yazeed! What are you saying regarding (performing) the Umra?’ So I said, ‘By my father and my mother being for you<sup>asws</sup>! That is up to you<sup>asws</sup>, and there is no expenditure money with me’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Glory be to Allah<sup>azwj</sup>!  We<sup>asws</sup> would not encumber you and not suffice you’. So we went out until we ended up to that very place. So he<sup>asws</sup> initiated me saying, ‘O Yaeed!  This place is where you frequently meet your neighbours and your uncles in’. I said, ‘Yes’.

Then I related the news upon him<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘As for the slave girl, so she has not come yet. So when she does come, deliver to her the greetings from him<sup>asws</sup>’. So we went to Makkah and acquired her during that year. So she did not remain except for a little before she started expecting and gave birth to that boy.

Yazeed said, ‘And it was so that the brothers of Ali<sup>asws</sup> were hoping to inherit him<sup>asws</sup>, so his<sup>asws</sup> brothers were hostile to me with any sin (wrongdoing from me). So Is’haq Bin Ja’far said to them, ‘By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I have seen him and he used to (make) him (sit) near to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> in the gathering which I could not sit it’.
en.sarwar: “The the Imam (a.s.) said, “O Yazid, when ever you will pass through this place and meet and you will soon meet himgive him the glad news of the birth of trust worthy son to him, a protected and holy one. He will inform you of your meeting with me. You then inform him that the girl from whom this boy will be born is a girl from the family of Mary (Maria), the maiden girl of the Messenger of Allah, mother of Ibrahim. If will be able to convey my greetings to her you may do so.” Yazid has said, “After the death of abu Ibrahim I met Ali (al-Rida) (a.s.) and he began to speak to me.” He said, “O Yazid, “What do you say about performing ‘Umra (visit to Makka out of Hajj season)?” I said, “May Allah take my soul and the souls of my parents in service for your cause, it is up to you. I do not have the means to journey.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Glory belongs to Allah, We would not have asked you without first taking the rsponsibility for your exoenses.” We then left for ‘Umra until we reached that place. The Imam (a.s.) began to speak and he said, “This is the place wherein you would meet your neighbors and uncles very often.” I said, “Yes, it is true and then I related to him the story.” He then said to me, “The girl has not come as yet. When she will come I will convey his greetings to her.” Then we left for Makka and he bought her that year. Shortly afterwards she give borth to the that boy.” Yazid has said, “Brothers of Ali (al-Rida) wanted to have a part in the leadership and they became my enemies for no good reason. Ishaq ibn Ja‘far told them, by Allah, I have seen him sit so near to abu Ibrahim that even I could sit so close.”
